data.title: Labubu dolls discovered to contain Xinjiang cotton, banned due to forced labor, per recent test by The New York Times.
data.description: An examination conducted by The New York Times revealed that garments for certain popular dolls contained cotton originating from Xinjiang, China. This sourcing is prohibited in the United States due to concerns over human rights abuses.

data.title: Integro Bank Announces VIP CEO Club Event Featuring Sharon Lechter
data.description: A Members-Only Event named "Design Your Life, Build Your Wealth, and Live Your Legacy" is set to take place in Phoenix on April 24, 2026. Integro Bank will host this exclusive event for CEO Club members where attendees can participate in discussions focused on personal growth and financial success. The VIP CEO Club Event, scheduled for May 13, 2026, will offer valuable insights to members to help them enhance their lives, create wealth, and leave a lasting legacy.

data.title: Probe of Fed Chair Powell by Justice Department ends, clearing way for Warsh's confirmation by Senate for Federal Reserve.
data.description: The investigation into Jerome Powell by the Justice Department has been concluded, clearing the way for Senate consideration of Kevin Warsh's nomination to the Federal Reserve. This development comes as a significant step forward, bringing relief to those eagerly awaiting progress in the Senate. The closure of the probe has the potential to accelerate the decision-making process and pave the way for swift action on Warsh's nomination. This decision marks a pivotal moment in ensuring the Federal Reserve can continue its essential operations without any further delays or hindrances.

data.title: Norfolk Southern Is Managing 'Dramatic Rise In Fuel' Cost
data.description: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) released its first quarter 2026 earnings report on Friday, posting revenue of $3.0 billion, meeting expectations. Despite flat year-over-year performance, the stock experienced a decline in trading. Diluted earnings per share dropped by 27% to $2.43, while adjusted diluted EPS stood at $2.65, down 1% from the prior year but surpassing the $2.51 estimate. Income from railway operations saw a 23% decrease to $877 million, with adjusted income at $939 million, a 2% decline from the previous year. The operating ratio worsened to 70.7% from 61.7% compared to the previous year. Adjusted operating ratio increased by 80 basis points year over year to 68.7%. Variations between GAAP and adjusted outcomes were influenced by merger-related factors.

data.title: ArcBest Declares a $0.12/Share Quarterly Dividend
data.description: The Board of Directors of ArcBest® has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share for holders of record of its Common Stock, payable on May 22, 2026, to shareholders on record as of May 8, 2026. ArcBest® (Nasdaq: ARCB) is a leading integrated logistics company with a workforce of 14,000 employees spread across 250 campuses and service centers. Established in 1923, the company plays a pivotal role in facilitating the smooth operation of the global supply chain.

data.title: What's Going On With Gentex Stock Friday?
data.description: Shares of Gentex Corporation (NASDAQ: GNTX) climbed after the company released their first-quarter results, surpassing expectations from Wall Street. The strong demand for advanced features drove this success. Their adjusted earnings for the quarter were 48 cents per share, higher than the anticipated 45 cents. Quarterly revenue also saw a 17% increase year over year, reaching $675.44 million, exceeding the predicted $648.71 million. Additionally, revenue from VOXX totaled $88.6 million in the first quarter of 2026. Despite a drop in global light vehicle production, Gentex's core revenue reached $586.8 million, marking a 2% sequential growth. The company remains optimistic about its growth trajectory, evident from the raised sales outlook despite challenges in the global vehicle production sector.

data.title: In HelloNation, Behavioral Health Experts Cody Luke and David Spencer Explain Choosing a Therapist and What to Look for in Idaho Falls
data.description: A recent article discusses important elements that foster trust, reliability, and sustainable improvements in mental health. In Idaho Falls, Idaho, on April 24, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- guidance is provided on selecting an effective therapist. HelloNation's article addresses this topic, emphasizing critical considerations for individuals searching for mental health support.

data.title: Gemini to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 14, 2026
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Gemini Space Station, Inc. disclosed plans to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 post-market closure on May 14, 2026. The company, listed as Gemini on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker GEMI, operates as a global platform for cryptocurrencies and prediction markets. Following the announcement, a conference call is scheduled for May 15, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, where the management will provide insights and engage in discussions regarding the quarterly results.

data.title: Warner Bros. Discovery Updates the Date and Time of its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. stated that it has rescheduled its conference call and will disclose its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 6, 2026, following market closure. The Company, trading as WBD on Nasdaq, confirmed this update on April 24, 2026.
Iran Parliament Media office denies reports Iran's Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf resigned as head of negotiating Team. No new round of talks scheduled yet

data.title: Morgan Stanley introduces stablecoin reserves fund for issuers to earn interest, complying with GENIUS Act rules.
data.description: Morgan Stanley has introduced a reserve fund for stablecoin that complies with regulations, enabling issuers to generate interest and adhere to the GENIUS Act. This initiative aims to provide a platform for issuers to earn returns while meeting regulatory requirements. The fund offers an avenue for stablecoin issuers to boost their earnings within the framework of the GENIUS Act.

data.title: Jane Street requests dismissal of Terraform insider trading lawsuit, claiming $40 billion collapse trades were based on public signals.
data.description: Asset management firm Jane Street is seeking the dismissal of an insider trading lawsuit filed by Terraform, citing that their trades were made based on publicly available signals. Terraform has accused Jane Street of insider trading during Terra's $40 billion collapse. Jane Street contends that their actions were legal and not motivated by any privileged information. The case highlights the complexities surrounding trading practices and legal obligations.

data.title: Tezos unveils sTEZ, a protocol-level liquid staking token to boost liquidity without relying on outside sources.
data.description: Tezos has recently unveiled sTEZ, a new liquid staking token created at the protocol level. This token is designed to address the balance between liquidity and network security within the Tezos ecosystem without relying on external sources. The introduction of sTEZ aims to enhance the overall efficiency and robustness of the Tezos network.

data.title: Trump criticizes prediction markets; White House warns against betting on decisions. His family invests in them, conflicting with his stance.
data.description: Staff members have been cautioned by the White House against engaging in bets on governmental choices. Nonetheless, the president's family ties to these companies contradict the message being conveyed, creating a conflict of interest.
